text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ardan! Yaeno! How were those Japanese sweets I
asked you to try?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
They were absolutely delicious! I wish we could
have sweets like that every day at the Mejiro
household!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Really? That is definitely some high praise! Okay,
okay, what did you think, Yaeno?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. I haven't tried them yet, so I
cannot say the same.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that right? Um, is there something about
them you don't like?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: No... It's nothing like that. It's just...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh yes, the squirrel motif was quite adorable! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The way that Squirrelio stares back at you with his
big ol' eyes... I couldn't possibly eat him!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: W-wait, you gave it a name?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you both so much! I'm beyond honored to
hear the praise. For my next batch, I'm gonna try
and make something with a long shelf life!
